headline: 2 Reasons to Like PANW and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Over the past six months, Palo Alto Networks’s shares (currently trading at $163.76) have posted a disappointing 17% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 5.6% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: AI fears may be mispricing these 24 stocks, Jefferies says

headline: Meta Platforms, Spotify, and 5 Other Stocks to Buy in the Market Wreckage
summary: Jefferies says stocks including Meta Platforms, Spotify, ServiceNow and Snowflake have been unfairly punished amid fears about artificial intelligence competition.

headline: Palo Alto Networks Targets OT And 5G With New AI Security Alliances
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) announced a verified industrial cybersecurity solution with Siemens, targeting operational technology in manufacturing. At MWC, the company introduced an expanded global partner ecosystem focused on AI driven protection for industrial private 5G, data centers, and autonomous edge environments. New collaborations include partners such as Nokia, U Mobile, Aeris, and Celerway, aimed at securing sovereign AI and distributed edge use cases. Palo Alto Networks...
